rulings.Case Title: CHARLES AIKINS VS. RPI COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike, Tax Costs
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 10, 2014 in Department 503 at 2:00 p.m., Line 1. Defendant RPI Co.¿s motion to tax plaintiff¿s memorandum of costs: the Court plans on continuing the hearing on this motion. A new hearing date will be discussed with the parties at the hearing on the other two motions on calendar in this action. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: CHARLES AIKINS VS. RPI COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Rpi Companys Motion For Judgment Notwithstanding The Verdict
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 10, 2014 in Department 503 at 2:00 p.m., Line 1. Defendant RPI Company¿s motion for judgment notwithstanding the verdict: hearing required. The hearing will be at 2:00p.m. Both sides must bring proposed orders to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. = (503/TLJ)
